25:I[766,["/_next/static/chunks/14iy9u_bz-pgx.js","/_next/static/chunks/0cxg64m_kli2i.js"],"MetadataBoundary"]
7:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"What Sleep Does"}]
8:["$","p",null,{"children":"During each consolidation cycle, Mnemosyne:"}]
9:["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Scans"}]," Working Memory for entries older than TTL/2 (12 hours by default)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Groups"}]," candidates by ",["$","code",null,{"children":"source"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Summarizes"}]," each group via local LLM (TinyLlama) or AAAK text substitution"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Promotes"}]," summaries to Episodic Memory (with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"summary_of"}]," tracking originals)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Evicts"}]," original Working Memory entries"]}],"\n"]}]
a:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Trigger Conditions"}]
b:["$","p",null,{"children":"Consolidation triggers on:"}]
c:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Age threshold"}],": When Working Memory entries exceed TTL/2 (default: 12 hours with 24h TTL)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Explicit call"}],": ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mem.consolidate()"}]," for manual consolidation"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Shutdown"}],": Graceful process exit"]}],"\n"]}]
d:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Consolidation Pipeline"}]
e:["$","$L1d",null,{"chart":"\nflowchart LR\n  A[Working Memory] -->|age > TTL/2| B[Candidate Selection]\n  B -->|group by source| C[Group Entries]\n  C -->|summarize| D[LLM or AAAK]\n  D -->|promote| E[Episodic Memory]\n  C -->|evict originals| F[Delete from Working]\n"}]
f:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Step-by-Step"}]
10:["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Candidate selection"}],": Find all Working Memory entries where ",["$","code",null,{"children":"created_at < now - TTL/2"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Group by source"}],": Cluster candidates by their ",["$","code",null,{"children":"source"}]," field"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Summarize"}],": For each group, generate a summary using:","\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Local LLM (TinyLlama) if available"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["AAAK ",["$","code",null,{"children":"encode()"}]," text substitution as fallback"]}],"\n"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Promote"}],": Insert summary into ",["$","code",null,{"children":"episodic_memory"}]," with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"summary_of"}]," referencing the original IDs"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Evict"}],": Delete the original entries from ",["$","code",null,{"children":"working_memory"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Log"}],": Record the consolidation in ",["$","code",null,{"children":"consolidation_log"}]]}],"\n"]}]
11:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Retention Values"}]
12:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Parameter"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_WM_MAX"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"10000"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Maximum Working Memory entries"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"TTL"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"24h"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Time-to-live for Working Memory entries"}]]}]]}]]}]
13:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Monitoring Consolidation"}]
14:["$","p",null,{"children":["Consolidation events are logged to the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"consolidation_log"}]," table:"]}]
15:["$","p",null,{"children":["|| Column | Type | Description |\n|--------|------|-------------|\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"id"}]," | INTEGER | Auto-increment primary key |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"session_id"}]," | TEXT | Session that was consolidated |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"items_consolidated"}]," | INTEGER | Number of entries promoted |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"summary_preview"}]," | TEXT | Preview of the generated summary |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"created_at"}]," | TIMESTAMP | When consolidation ran |"]}]
16:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L1e",null,{"ref":"$undefined","iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 16v-4","key":"1dtifu"}],["path",{"d":"M12 8h.01","key":"e9boi3"}]],"className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Performance Impact"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"Sleep consolidation runs in a background thread and does not block agent operations. On typical hardware, a full cycle processes ~1000 entries in under 5 seconds."}]}]]}]]}]}]
